speaker: speaker1
text: have you seen the new Cosmo magazine that I was reading this morning ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I think I may have seen it on the kitchen table .

speaker: speaker1
text: you're right , thanks . There's an interesting interview with a top director about his latest film that I want to finish .

speaker: speaker1
text: it's Martin Scorsese . You liked his film , The Departed , didn't you ?

speaker: speaker2
text: yes , it was fantastic ! Can I read the article when you're finished ?

speaker: speaker1
text: sure . You know it has an online edition , too . You should go online to read if you want to read it now .

speaker: speaker2
text: that's ok . I'll wait until you're finished . Just out of curiosity , do you have a subscription for that magadize ?

speaker: speaker1
text: no . I don't buy it regularly enough for it to be worthwhile .

speaker: speaker2
text: how much does the magadize cost ?

speaker: speaker1
text: it's almost three pounds now , and I think they're going to put the price up to four pounds soon .

speaker: speaker2
text: that's quite expensive . Who is their target audience ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Cosmo mainly has a middle-class readership , but I think circulation will fall dramatically if the price goes up anymore .

speaker: speaker2
text: I bet you'll still buy it , though . You wouldn't be able to live without your fashion magazine !
